title: ScreenSpec
description: Input schema for a ScreenSpec record. Derived from screenSpecInputSchema in backend/src/lib/dsl/delta-spec.ts.

name.description: Screen name (also used as route label)

description.description: What this screen does and why

productSpecId.description: FK to ProductSpec this screen belongs to

actor.description: Primary user persona interacting with this screen

userIntent.description: What the user is trying to accomplish

layoutHint.description: Rough layout suggestion (e.g. list-detail, form, dashboard)

actions.description: User actions available on this screen

dataNeeds.description: Data bindings required to render this screen

emptyStates.description: How the screen looks when there is no data

errorStates.description: Error conditions and how they are surfaced
